rationale: Educ. Code §22.053 governs civil liability immunity for school district volunteers. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A volunteer who is serving as a direct service volunteer of a school district is immune from civil liability to the same extent as a professional employee of a school district under Section 22.0511.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed change regarding homestead exemption amounts.
